# Copilot Instructions for OSH 2026

For any task in this repository, follow these requirements first.

## Read First
- `/memories/repo/osh-2026-course.md`
- `/memories/repo/osh-2026-lab0-checklist.md`

## Must Follow
- Use PIP flow: Plan -> Implementation -> Proof.
- Keep AI work auditable: include process and evidence.
- For key changes, provide tests/benchmark + trace/log.
- Apply least-privilege defaults for automation.
- Do not expose secrets in prompts/logs/files.

## Proof Requirements
- Automated test evidence.
- Minimal reproduction steps.
- At least one trace source (`perf`/`ftrace`/`eBPF`) with explanation.
